label: F3
evidence: Reynolds 2021: 'Three fibroblast subsets expressing extracellular matrix (ECM)-related genes such as MMP2, COL1A1, COL1A2 and NT5E (encodes CD73) are present in healthy human skin, dominated by Fb1 fibroblasts with minor populations of Fb2 and Fb3 fibroblasts.' F3 in Gopee 2024 corresponds to Fb3 in Reynolds 2021 — a minor dermal fibroblast population sharing ECM-related gene expression with Fb1 and Fb2.
